mapper.select: SELECT rrm.*, rm.material_name, rm.material_code, rm.unit FROM repair_record_material rrm LEFT JOIN repair_material rm ON rrm.material_id = rm.id WHERE rrm.repair_record_id = #{repairRecordId} ORDER BY rrm.create_time
SELECT rrm.* FROM repair_record_material rrm WHERE rrm.material_id = #{materialId} ORDER BY rrm.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_record_material (repair_record_id, material_id, quantity, unit_price, total_price, remark, create_time) VALUES (#{repairRecordId}, #{materialId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalPrice}, #{remark}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM repair_record_material WHERE material_id = #{materialId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) FROM repair_record_material WHERE material_id = #{materialId}
